name: Andy Luo

projects.title: CryptoGoGo
projects.description: Online Cryptocurrency Community and Trading platform

projects.title: Dynrank.js
projects.description: High-performance dynamic bar chart visualization library

aboutpara:
During the past year of work, I learned a lot not only about web techniques but also the skills to collaborate in an agile team. I have dived deeply into UX/animation implementations, cross-browser compatibility, and project infrastructure.
My favorite language is TypeScript, and I have been learning a backend framework based on TypeScript which is NestJs recently. With the support of TypeScript, AOP style coding like Spring Boot becomes possible and it makes the code clean, beautiful, and efficient.

resume.description:
Experienced software engineer with a degree in Computer Science and
1+ years of full-time web application development. Passionate about
building user-friendly, scalable, and reliable systems. Self-motivated
and possess a thirst for knowledge. Developed and demonstrated
multitasking skills, fasting learning ability, and extensive teamwork
experience. Team player with good communication skills, agile
methodologies, and solid knowledge of software development life
cycle.

experiences.position: Jr Frontend Developer at Snappay Inc.
experiences.bullets: Build company's propagation marketing web application with Vue.js and TypeScript，increase daily user growth from 3% to 10%,Design and implement User Activity Tracking System and DeepLink System for company's flagship mobile app with Google Analytics， increase MAU by 50% ,Optimize front-end build tool with Webpack and Vite，increase server boot speed by 97% and reduce bundle size by 50% ,Implement visual elements and user interaction for hybrid app and mobile websites ,Implement REST API in company's internal and external micro-services with Java，Spring Boot and MyBatis ,Design and optimize web application architecture，reduce the number of HTTP requests from O(n) to O(1) ,Maintain company's Content & Admin Management System with jQuery，Bootstrap, Spring Boot，AWS S3，AWS SNS and MyBatis ,Compose api documents and tech blogs for collaboration and knowledge sharing ,Test and debug api with Postman and Swagger ,Build local development and test environment with Docker ,Analyze logs with Elasticsearch to locate and solve cross-service online bugs ,Solve cross-browser compatibility issues and bugs，improve user experience ,Communicate with the product team and design tech solutions to the needs

experiences.position: Shift Lead at CoCo Fresh Tea & Juice
experiences.bullets: Manage store daily operation and train new employees

education.universityPara: During my time at UofT, I have built a solid basis in computer science, mathematics, and statistics. The most useful soft skills I have learned are self-learning and team-working. I have done plenty of projects in teams in many subjects like web app building, OOP software development, machine learning competition, statistical report, etc.
